main_visual_title:
Transforming industrial operations 
 through Spatial Intelligence
main_industry: DEEP.FINE's proven technology validated across diverse industries
main_subtitle_our: DEEP.FINE provides industrial AI solutions that solve real-world challenges in logistics, manufacturing/MRO, and spatial data fields.
main_our_item_txt_1: LOGI.FINE is a solution that supports warehouse picking, inspection, sorting, and packing operations based on smart glasses and Vision AI.
main_our_item_tit_2: AI Glass-Based On-Site Workflow Support Solution
main_our_item_txt_2:
DAO is a solution that provides the necessary information for inspection and maintenance tasks on manufacturing, MRO, and defense sites 
 via smart glasses, supporting workers in their on-site operations.
main_our_item_tit_3: Spatial Computing-Based Digital Space Construction Solution
main_our_item_txt_3:
DSC is a solution that builds real-world spaces into 3D spatial data 
 and combines positioning awareness with AR content to realize space-based services.
main_title_work:
We Transform 
 How Industrial Sites Work
main_subtitle_work: We perceive spaces, digitize operations, and accelerate the AX transformation of industrial management.
main_work_item_txt_1: Recognizes real-world environments and structures them into 3D spatial data, transforming industrial site spatial information into operational assets.
main_work_item_txt_2: Recognizes images, barcodes, equipment, and tasks from the worker’s perspective to support inspection, auditing, and photo/video-based task logging.
main_work_item_subTit_3: Task Log Analysis · API Integration · Dashboard
main_work_item_txt_3: Analyzes task logs, photo/video records, errors, and processing time data to identify operational bottlenecks and support workflow optimization.
main_why_txt_3: Global Enterprises & Public Sector Clients and Partners
main_why_txt_4: No.1 Smart Glass Adoption in Korea
main_subtitle_why: Operation Log Analysis · API Integration · Dashboard

dao_result_subTit: It is proven by results in the actual field.
dao_result_txt_1: Remote safety inspections of facilities across Gyeonggi Province, implementation effects of AR work guides in the shipbuilding industry
dao_result_txt_2: Establishment of a predictive maintenance (MRO) system for manufacturing equipment
dao_result_txt_3: Application of OJT for new workers in the shipbuilding industry
dao_result_txt_4: Completion of workflow setup for manufacturing equipment
dao_case_tit_1_1:
Remote Safety Inspection Using Smart Glasses
for Facility Safety Inspection Across Gyeonggi-do
dao_case_txt_1_1: Share real-time on-site footage through smart glasses to provide live consulting on maintenance and reinforcement measures.
dao_case_txt_1_2:
Previously, about 40% of facility safety inspections were conducted remotely,
reducing travel time and costs by 60% and increasing civil complaint processing rates by 3 times.
dao_case_etc_1_3: {#b}Remote Multi-Site Inspection{/b} by a Single Expert

dao_case_txt_2_1:
Built a remote site management platform to manage construction sites in real time
by supporting a wide range of smart device integrations, including smart glasses and unmanned drones through REMOTE.
dao_case_txt_2_2: Perform safety inspection items using smart glasses, providing a standardized business workflow.
dao_case_tit_3_1:
Quality Control & Hygiene Status Inspection Methods
for Domestic and Global Suppliers of Food Enterprises
dao_case_txt_3_1: Enabled domestic/global supplier quality control and non-face-to-face A/S processing through REMOTE.

dao_case_txt_4_1: Through smart glasses, DEEP.FINE's hyper-realistic XR manual and immersive, virtual, remote Mercedes-Benz vehicle guidance service allow customers and dealers to communicate conveniently regarding Mercedes' technology and exceptional interior/exterior designs without visiting the store in person, thereby leading the paradigm of future metaverse digital consumption.

cutting maintenance time by 30% and shortening new worker OJT periods by 40%.
dao_case_etc_5_3: {#b}40% Shortening{/b} of New Worker OJT Period
dao_subtitle_faq: People and Organizational Structure Leading DEEP.FINE's Innovation
dao_faq_txt_1:
DAO supports a wide range of device environments.

For on-site work:
• Smart glasses: RealWear, Vuzix, Google Glass Enterprise, Magic Leap, etc. * All major industrial smart glasses are supported, and inquiries about specific models can be confirmed through separate consultation.
• Mobile: Android, iOS

For management/monitoring:
• PC web-based CMS (administrator system)
dao_faq_tit_2: Can it be used offline (without internet)?
dao_faq_txt_2:
Yes, it's possible.

DAO supports offline mode, allowing checklist creation, photo capture, and data recording without an internet connection.

When internet connectivity is available, data automatically syncs to the server.
dao_faq_tit_3: Can it be customized to fit our company environment?
dao_faq_txt_3:
Yes, it's possible.

DAO provides universal features ready to use across various industrial sites including manufacturing, construction, logistics, and equipment maintenance.

Company-specific requirements such as existing system integration (ERP, MES, CMMS), workflow design, and report template changes can be supported through separate consultation.
dao_faq_tit_4: Can I try the solution before adoption?
dao_faq_txt_4:
Yes, it's possible.

If you request a product demo, we'll send a guidance email for trial account issuance.
With the issued account, you can freely use DAO in your actual work environment for 2–4 weeks,

and if you're satisfied after the trial, you can proceed with full adoption.
dao_faq_tit_5: How are implementation costs and technical support provided?
dao_faq_txt_5:
DAO is billed per account and available as a monthly or annual subscription.

Initial training support is available online or offline during implementation, and a dedicated technical support team operates to ensure stable usage.

Detailed pricing plans and support content can be discussed through consultation upon inquiry.
dao_banner_text:
Our experts will propose a tailored implementation plan optimized for your site operations.
Feel free to reach out to us.
dsc_industries_text: Applicable to any place with space
dsc_industries_subtext: DSC digitalizes various spaces ranging from festivals and tourism to exhibitions and public facilities.
dsc_industries_list_txt_1: AR docent · exhibition commentary, visitor flow analysis
dsc_industries_list_txt_2: 3D reconstruction of exhibits · automatic commentary display, AR wayfinding
dsc_industries_list_txt_3: Crowd density guide, booth · parking AR map
dsc_industries_list_txt_4: AR promotions · detailed info augmentation, customer dwell time analysis
dsc_industries_list_txt_5: Indoor AR navigation where GPS is unavailable, facility control
dsc_industries_list_txt_6: AR work manuals, safety zone hazard alerts
dsc_industries_list_txt_7: Non-face-to-face virtual tours, interior AR simulation
dsc_industries_list_txt_8: Urban traffic · crowd density management, spatial information services
dsc_features_text: Transforming real-world spaces into data and managing them
dsc_features_txt_1: Even large-scale facilities like exhibition halls, factories, and stores can be scanned with a LiDAR-equipped tablet, and the AI will automatically generate a 3D Map.
dsc_features_txt_1_2: In the no-code editor, you can place, modify, or delete all content—such as 2D panels, 3D assets, videos, and audio—using a simple drag-and-drop interface.
dsc_features_logo_1: Gwanghwamun area of approx. 50,000㎡ digitalized into DSC (Seoul Metropolitan Government · LX)
dsc_features_tit_2: Precise VPS Indoor Positioning & AR Navigation
dsc_features_txt_2: Vision AI-based VPS (Visual Positioning System) matches camera video features with the server's 3D Map in real time to recognize the user's position and direction within centimeters.
dsc_features_txt_2_2: Even in indoor environments where GPS fails, it accurately augments optimal AR route guidance, exhibition commentary, and work manuals onto the precise coordinates.
dsc_features_logo_2: Indoor AR route guidance in large stations including Gwanghwamun, Seoul, and Suseo Stations — Specialized service built for the transportation vulnerable
dsc_features_txt_3: Content modifications are applied in real time, eliminating the need for app updates. By sharing a digital space link, users can experience the XR space without installing any app.
dsc_features_logo_3: Provided AR experiences through link sharing at numerous exhibitions and pop-up stores
dsc_features_txt_4: Based on CCTV and LiDAR sensors, it collects and analyzes the location, movement paths, density, and congestion levels of visitors within the space in real time.
dsc_features_txt_4_2: Hazardous areas are immediately identified to trigger alerts, while visitors are guided via AR maps to less crowded routes. It also supports booth/parking location guidance and eases traffic congestion through vehicle recognition.
dsc_features_logo_4: Chuk-Jibsa (3 festivals, 29,206 users), Gwang-Jibsa (Naejangsan National Park, 4,614 users)
dsc_features_txt_5: Visually tracks and visualizes 3D spatial data collected by LiDAR sensors in real time.
dsc_features_txt_5_2: Easily monitor object locations, movement paths, congestion, and hazard zones on a single dashboard, while driving operational decisions based on visitor flow, dwell time, and content click data.
dsc_features_logo_5: Currently applied to various industries including tourism, logistics, and transportation infrastructure
dsc_result_subTit_1: Start immediately with your existing scanning equipment
dsc_result_txt_1: Scan spaces and finish AR content editing using equipment you already own, such as LiDAR tablets, professional scanners, or 360° cameras. Planners and marketers can directly build and run projects using the no-code editor.
dsc_result_subTit_2: Centimeter-level accuracy indoors compared to GPS
dsc_result_txt_2: VPS technology delivers centimeter-level precise positioning across indoor, underground, large-scale, and outdoor spaces. Validated by Korea's largest AR navigation implementation case.
dsc_result_subTit_3: Data analysis through pre-installed CCTVs and sensors
dsc_result_txt_3: Integrate AI analysis by leveraging pre-existing CCTVs found in most festivals, tourist attractions, and public facilities. Deploy congestion, parking, and safety control features instantly without purchasing extra hardware.
dsc_result_subTit_4: Ultra-realistic space rendering based on 3D GS
dsc_result_txt_4: Automatically generate near-real 3D spatial models using 3D Gaussian Splatting technology simply via video recording, without complex modeling. Rapidly produce immersive XR content and spatial services.
dsc_case_tit_1_1: Integrated Cultural & Tourism Festival Service (Chuk-Jibsa · Gwang-Jibsa)
dsc_case_txt_1_1: Ensuring safe and convenient festival operations through real-time congestion and parking info guidance powered by AI analysis, alongside AI-customized route recommendations based on visitor profiles.
dsc_case_etc_1_1: {#b}Applied Festivals/Sites{/b} : Busan International Rock Festival, Jinju Namgang Yudeung Festival, National Parks, National Gardens, large-scale exhibitions, etc. (7 total)
dsc_case_etc_1_2: {#b}Results{/b} : 71,594 total visitors, 416,579 service uses, over 5,100 AI recommendations, satisfaction score of 4.3/5.0
dsc_case_tit_2_1: Indoor/Outdoor AR Navigation for Large Public Facilities
dsc_case_txt_2_1: Navigating complex indoor spaces with centimeter-level precision through vision-based VPS technology.
dsc_case_etc_2_1: {#b}Applied Spaces{/b} : Large railway stations and complex underground facilities
dsc_case_etc_2_2: {#b}Validated Case{/b} : Korea's largest AR navigation demonstration (Gwanghwamun, Seoul, and Suseo Stations)
dsc_case_tit_3_1: Digital Twin Solution for Equipment and Manufacturing Processes
dsc_case_txt_3_1: Visualizing manufacturing processes and building anomaly detection monitoring systems via 3D Digital Twins.
dsc_case_etc_3_1: Enables rapid field response via {#b}immediate anomaly detection alerts{/b}.
dsc_case_etc_3_2: Analyzing and enhancing productivity through {#b}real-time process progress visualization{/b} and workstation-specific {#b}KPI monitoring{/b}.
dsc_faq_tit_1: What equipment can be used to scan spaces?
dsc_faq_txt_1:
You don't need to purchase separate LiDAR equipment or 3D scanners; immediate space scanning is possible with just a tablet equipped with a LiDAR sensor.
Additionally, professional equipment you already own can be utilized (e.g., professional LiDAR 3D scanners, 360° cameras, etc.).
dsc_faq_tit_2: Do I need a developer to create XR content?
dsc_faq_txt_2:
No, you can create XR content without a developer.
DSC provides an iPad app-based no-code editor that allows you to place images, videos, text, and 3D objects onto the 3D space via a drag-and-drop method.
Content updates are reflected in real time, making separate app updates unnecessary, so planners or marketers can directly produce and operate content.
Anyone can complete AR/VR content in a few minutes without complex coding.
dsc_faq_tit_3: Do users have to install an app to experience AR?
dsc_faq_txt_3:
No, AR experiences are possible without installing an app.
You can offer AR experiences on web browsers by sharing a link, or via the DSC Viewer app.
Accessible instantly through QR code scanning or URL connection, making it easy to distribute and showcase AR content to unspecified large numbers of visitors at pop-up stores, exhibitions, and tourist destinations.
dsc_faq_tit_4: Is it possible to scan large-scale spaces? How long does it take to build a digital space?
dsc_faq_txt_4:
Yes, large-scale spaces can be scanned.
DSC holds Korea's largest demonstration case, having digitalized an area of approximately 50,000㎡ around the Gwanghwamun district. Large spaces are processed by scanning section by section and then integrating them. We provide optimal scanning method guidance through pre-adoption field consulting.
Space scanning can be completed in around one day for small stores or exhibition halls, and the scanning schedule scales up depending on the size of the space.
dsc_faq_tit_5: Can I try the solution before adopting it?
dsc_faq_txt_5:
Yes, you can.
If you apply for a product demo, we will send a guidance email for issuing a trial account.
With the issued account, you can freely use DSC within your actual work environment for 2 to 4 weeks. A dedicated manager will support onboarding during the trial period, and you can proceed with official adoption if satisfied after the experience. Detailed pricing plans and support details are available through consultation.
dsc_banner_tit: Easily Transform Your Real-World Space into a Digital Space
dsc_banner_txt:
Our representative will propose a customized adoption plan tailored to your spatial characteristics. 
Please feel free to inquire.
dsc_banner_box_txt_1: Spaces transformed into digital by DEEP.FINE
dsc_banner_box_txt_2: And the numbers continue to grow at this very moment
logi_visual_title:
Start Virtual DAS Picking Right Now,
 Without Any Equipment
logi_visual_subtitle: DSL is a tote-based virtual DAS picking solution that can be executed instantly, regardless of your picking strategy, without the need for paper or facilities.
logi_problem_text: Before and after adopting DAS picking, the field changes.
logi_as_list_txt_1: Mis-picking repeats due to lost paper or incorrect quantity entries, leading to re-work and claims, which causes a constant management burden.
logi_as_list_tit_2: Massive initial investment in DAS facilities
logi_as_list_txt_2: Requires months of construction and tens of millions of won in initial costs. Additional construction is inevitable whenever layouts or SKUs change, leading to slow field responses.
logi_as_list_txt_3: A wide gap in processing speeds and error rates opens between experienced workers and new staff. If veterans quit, productivity takes a hit, and training new hires alone takes weeks.
logi_as_list_txt_4: Hardly any information can be verified other than work completion status. Operations repeat based on intuition without grasping where time is wasted or errors occur.
logi_to_list_txt_1: Work is automatically defined based on picking orders generated on the web, proceeding paperless throughout the entire process. Confusion disappears as all stages from instruction to progress and completion are logged.
logi_to_list_tit_2: Instant configuration of tote-based Virtual DAS
logi_to_list_txt_2: A DAS environment can be configured on the same day without separate facilities. Immediate responses are possible without extra construction even if SKUs, lines, or location layouts change.
logi_to_list_txt_3: The system guides picking paths, quantities, and locations in real time so that anyone can perform work at the same level. New hires can be deployed on the very same day.
logi_to_list_txt_4: Field data automatically accumulates, covering work time, paths, error occurrence locations, and difficulty by SKU. Staff assignment and path design can be enhanced based on this data.
logi_industries_text:
Instantly applicable to any logistics field,
 regardless of picking methods
logi_industries_subtext: Keep your existing operational methods, with zero adoption burden. Whichever picking strategy you use—piece, batch, or wave—you can apply it right away without changing current workflows.
logi_industries_list_txt_1: E-commerce logistics centers where multi-order simultaneous processing and rapid shipping are key
logi_industries_list_txt_2: Optimized for small-to-medium center environments with frequent labor turnover and difficulties in equipment investment
logi_industries_list_txt_3: Retail sorting tasks that flexibly respond to SKU fluctuations and peak seasons
logi_industries_list_txt_4: Logistics environments requiring strict error blockades and rapid, accurate sorting
logi_industries_list_txt_5: Unifying picking strategies of various shippers into a single system
logi_industries_list_txt_6: Fundamentally blocking picking errors for multi-product, small-quantity parts and consumables
logi_features_text: Core features that elevate field efficiency
logi_features_tit_1:
Instant Virtual DAS configuration 
simply by uploading picking orders
logi_features_txt_1: When you select tote options during picking order uploads, totes are automatically assigned in order number sequence.
logi_features_txt_1_2: The sorting environment is instantly completed with a single upload, without separate mapping tasks.
logi_features_logo_1: Saves over 90% in initial investment costs compared to building DAS facilities
logi_features_tit_2:
Real-time mis-picking block 
via 3-step scan sequence
logi_features_txt_2: Validates picking in real time by recognizing in the order of Location → Product Barcode → Destination Tote.
logi_features_txt_2_2: Immediate alerts are issued for quantity or product errors, fundamentally blocking re-work and claims.
logi_features_logo_2: Achieved 0 re-work cases from mis-picking / 100% picking accuracy
logi_features_tit_3:
Cart slot visualization / 
Multi-order simultaneous processing
logi_features_txt_3: Check progress by slot in real time via the cart slot panel on the right side of the picking screen.
logi_features_txt_3_2: Grasp at a glance which tote has been filled with how many items to efficiently handle multi-orders.
logi_features_logo_3: Improves units per hour (UPH) processed orders
logi_features_tit_4:
Complete hands-free picking 
linked with Smart Glasses
logi_features_txt_4: Instantly pairs with Smart Glasses via a single QR code scan on the tablet.
logi_features_txt_4_2: Receive real-time guidance for SKUs, quantities, and locations through the glasses, keeping both hands free to focus purely on picking.
logi_features_logo_4: Shortens adaptation period for new workers
logi_features_tit_5:
Immediate KPI feedback upon completion 
Data-driven operational enhancement
logi_features_txt_5: Check UPH, elapsed time, and accuracy immediately after picking completion. It automatically collects and analyzes data applicable to improving field operations, such as picking time by SKU and throughput by time slot.
logi_features_logo_5: Automatic collection of core indicators such as UPH, accuracy, and elapsed time
logi_result_txt_1: Configure a virtual DAS instantly with just totes and tablets. Reduces initial investment costs compared to traditional DAS.
logi_result_txt_2: The same workforce handles more orders through optimized routing and automated guidance.
logi_result_txt_3: Incorrect picking will not be processed as completed due to sequential verification of location, product, and tote.
logi_result_subTit_4: Compatibility rate with existing picking strategies
logi_result_txt_4: Use your current methods and strategies exactly as they are without changing picking formats like piece, batch, or wave.
logi_case_txt_1_1: Integrated three tasks—picking, inspection, and DAS—into a single Smart Glasses-based system to digitalize the entire field process.
logi_case_txt_1_2: Escaped from traditional paper picking sheets and manual inspection methods to secure a standardized work environment based on barcode scanning and video recording.
logi_case_etc_1_1: {#b}Scan accuracy of 98% or higher{/b} : Validated based on over 1,000 scans of location, product, and cart barcodes
logi_case_etc_1_2: {#b}Zero DAS sorting errors{/b} : Put box numbers and location arrows display immediately upon product scan
logi_case_etc_1_3: {#b}99% inspection video save success rate{/b} : Automatically secures CS claim response data through order-unit recording
logi_case_txt_2_1: Introduced a Smart Glasses-based picking solution to the Hanjin Namseoul Core Logistics Center, drastically improving field work efficiency.
logi_case_txt_2_2: Escaped from structures dependent on experts to build a standardized picking environment where new personnel can be deployed immediately.
logi_case_etc_2_1: {#b}44% reduction{/b} : Average processing time per picking (36 seconds → 20 seconds)
logi_case_etc_2_2: {#b}Saves 18.45 million KRW per month{/b} : Labor cost reduction (based on deploying 5 people instead of 9)
logi_case_etc_2_3: {#b}44% increase{/b} : Average daily picking productivity (1,389 Boxes → 2,000 Boxes)
logi_faq_tit_1: Is integration with existing WMS/ERP systems required?
logi_faq_txt_1: No. You can use it immediately simply by uploading excel files without separate integration. Since you only need to extract picking orders in a standard excel format, it operates independently regardless of your existing system. If WMS/ERP integration is required, we support it through separate consultation via API methods.
logi_faq_tit_2: Can it not be used without Smart Glasses?
logi_faq_txt_2: You can use all features identically with just tablets. Smart Glasses are an optional addition for fields that want to keep both hands completely free. It is also possible to introduce tablets first to verify the effects, and then gradually expand the application of Smart Glasses according to necessity.
logi_faq_tit_3: Can I see the work status from the office in real time?
logi_faq_txt_3: Through the web-based management screen, you can grasp the work situation in real time without being on site. Progress status by wave, UPH, picking accuracy, and error occurrence status can be checked directly on the dashboard, and delayed or erroneous work is immediately detected. Since managers can connect via a PC browser without installing a separate client, they can monitor field operational status remotely.
logi_faq_tit_4: Can we test on a small scale before adoption?
logi_faq_txt_4: You can validate with a small pilot in an actual field environment through a trial account. It proceeds via a phased rollout method where it is applied to a specific wave or part of a work line first to check effects, and then transitions to company-wide expansion once verified. During the trial period, a dedicated Deepfine manager directly supports everything from field setup to operational settlement.
logi_banner_text:
We offer free proposals for optimal adoption plans tailored to your industry and field environment.
Inquire right now.
ceo_subtitle: DEEP.FINE is transforming industrial operations through AI and Spatial Computing technology.
ceo_txt_0:
DEEP.FINE is transforming industrial operations
 through AI and Spatial Computing technology.
ceo_text_1:
We connect on-site operational data with spatial data to 
standardize tasks that previously 
relied on manual labor and individual experience, 
shifting toward a safer, more efficient operational framework. 
Smart glasses, Vision AI, VPS, and 3D spatial data technology serve
 as the core foundations of DEEP.FINE to realize this vision.
ceo_text_2:
DEEP.FINE has consistently validated and commercialized 
its technology alongside customers in logistics, manufacturing, 
shipbuilding & heavy industry, MRO, tourism, and public sectors.
ceo_text_3:
Building upon these proven technologies, 
we are now expanding into a wider range of job sites and industries 
to deliver industrial AX solutions proven by our customers' success.
our_teams_subtitle_1: We develop the core technologies that realize DEEP.FINE's Spatial AI and industrial operational solutions. From Vision AI, 3D spatial mapping, and VPS to cloud systems and smart glass applications, we build the technological foundation that works directly on the job site.
our_teams_list_1_1: AI & Vision Development: Developing industrial scene recognition, object recognition, Vision AI, and AI Agent technologies.
our_teams_list_1_2: Platform Development: Building cloud architectures, backends, APIs, and data processing infrastructures.
our_teams_list_1_3: Application Development: Creating mobile, web, smart glass, and XR-based on-site applications.
our_teams_list_1_4: Spatial Computing Development: Advancing VPS, 3D mapping, indoor positioning, and spatial data processing technologies.
our_teams_subtitle_2: We translate industrial site requirements into actual product and service experiences. We analyze client workflows to design interfaces, features, contents, and deployment structures that users can easily navigate on-site.
our_teams_list_2_1: Product Planning: Establishing solution direction, feature prioritization, and product roadmaps.
our_teams_list_2_2: UX/UI Design: Designing user experiences tailored for web, mobile, smart glass, and XR environments.
our_teams_list_2_3: Project Management: Managing PoCs, system deployment, client requirements, schedules, and deliverables.
our_teams_list_2_4: Content & Service Design: Creating 3D assets, manuals, operational scenarios, and field-optimized service content.
our_teams_subtitle_3: We manage HR, finance, general affairs, legal affairs, and internal operational frameworks to ensure DEEP.FINE's sustainable growth. We create an environment where team members can fully focus on product development and client relations, enhancing the stability and efficiency of organizational operations.
our_teams_list_3_1: Finance & Accounting: Managing accounting, funding, budgeting, settlements, and financial reporting.
our_teams_list_3_2: HR & Culture: Overseeing recruitment, onboarding, performance evaluations, organizational culture, and employee experiences.
our_teams_list_3_3: General Affairs & Asset Management: Supporting workplace environments, assets, contracts, procurement, and administrative tasks.
our_teams_list_3_4: Operations Support: Facilitating internal processes, documentation, compliance, and workflow optimization.
our_teams_subtitle_4: We bridge DEEP.FINE's technology and solutions with market opportunities and customer demands. We accelerate business growth and expand brand awareness through enterprise clients, strategic partnerships, exhibitions, PR, and digital marketing.
our_teams_list_4_1: Enterprise Sales: Identifying enterprise clients, managing sales pipelines, and handling strategic accounts.
our_teams_list_4_2: Strategic Partnerships: Establishing collaborative frameworks with corporate groups, public institutions, and industry-specific partners.
our_teams_list_4_3: Marketing Strategy: Planning campaigns, exhibitions, PR, content creation, and lead generation.
our_teams_list_4_4: Brand Communication: Strengthening brand awareness and credibility across online and offline channels.

main_title_trial: Try barcode picking and virtual DAS free for 14 days
main_subtitle_trial: est it instantly on a tablet app without installing any additional equipment.
dao_visual_title: Turn real-world spaces into data with AI and control them intelligently
dao_visual_subtitle: 설비 번호를 스캔하면 도면·매뉴얼이 눈앞에 뜨고, 음성 명령으로 체크리스트를 완료하고, 작업 결과가 자동으로 기록됩니다. 장갑을 낀 채로, 두 손은 자유롭게.
dao_problem_text: Before DAO. After DAO. A Different Operation
dao_as_list_tit_1: Fewer Skilled Workers, Decisions Still Driven by Experience
dao_as_list_txt_1: As skilled workers decline, field operations still depend on human experience and judgment.
dao_as_list_tit_2: Time Loss Due to Redundant Work
dao_as_list_txt_2: Manual records from the field are entered again in the office, resulting in repetitive and inefficient workflows.
dao_as_list_tit_3: Paper-Based Data, Hard to Search and Analyze
dao_as_list_txt_3: Work records are stored on paper or in personal files,  making them difficult to retrieve when needed.
dao_as_list_tit_4: High Costs Associated with Long-Distance Inspections
dao_as_list_txt_4: On-site visits by experts lead to excessive travel costs.
dao_to_list_tit_1: Instant Access via Equipment ID Recognition
dao_to_list_tit_2: Scan an equipment ID to instantly access drawings, manuals, and checklists in view.
dao_to_list_txt_2: Complete checklists and record work evidence—all with voice commands.
dao_to_list_tit_3: Automatic Digitization of All Work Data
dao_to_list_txt_3: Automatically save and sync checklists, photos, and voice notes—available anytime.
dao_to_list_tit_4: Solve Problems Through Remote Collaboration, Without Travel
dao_to_list_txt_4: Experts provide remote AR guidance—eliminating the need for on-site visits.
dao_industries_text:
Built for Every Field 
That Requires Maintenance and Inspection
dao_industries_subtext:
From shipbuilding and heavy industry to food and pharmaceuticals,
 customized and deployed to fit each field environment.
dao_features_text: We transform industrial workplaces with core DAO features.
dao_features_txt_1: Scan equipment IDs with smart glasses, and drawings/manuals appear instantly in your field of view.
dao_features_logo_1: Shipyard MRO site — 30% reduction in maintenance time
dao_features_txt_2: Capture the site directly with smart glasses and record work status by combining photos with voice memos.
dao_features_logo_2: Shipyard & construction sites — Streamlined on-site documentation
dao_features_txt_3: From creating standard work checklists to report writing, result reports (PDF, Excel) are automatically generated upon completion, and all data supports real-time synchronization across PC, mobile, and smart glasses.
dao_features_logo_3: Food company vendor quality inspection — 34% improvement in work productivity
dao_features_txt_4: Resolve on-site issues without travel using multi-party video conferencing with AR drawing and pointing for intuitive work instructions.
dao_features_logo_4: Gyeonggi-do remote safety inspection — 60% reduction in travel time and costs
dao_features_txt_1_2: Use the AI chatbot to instantly search manuals for maintenance, installation instructions, precautions, and more.
dao_features_txt_3_2: Augmented AR manuals and 3D objects overlaid on real-world objects enable intuitive information recognition.
dao_features_txt_4_2: Multiple users can simultaneously access augmented AR objects for multi-interaction.
term_privacy_intro: DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as 'DEEP.FINE Website' or 'http://www.deepfine.com') establishes and discloses this Privacy Policy in accordance with Article 30 of the Personal Information Protection Act to protect the personal information of data subjects and to handle related grievances quickly and smoothly.
term_privacy_section_1_desc: DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. processes personal information for the following purposes. The personal information being processed will not be used for purposes other than the following, and if the purpose of use changes, necessary measures such as obtaining separate consent will be implemented in accordance with Article 18 of the Personal Information Protection Act.
term_privacy_section_1_item_1_desc: Personal information is processed for the purposes of maintaining and managing membership qualifications, preventing unauthorized use of services, and verifying the consent of legal representatives when processing personal information of children under the age of 14.
term_privacy_section_1_item_2_desc: Personal information is processed for the purpose of providing services.
term_privacy_section_1_item_3_desc: Personal information is processed for the purposes of developing new services (products) and providing customized services, providing events and advertising information, offering opportunities to participate, identifying access frequencies, or compiling statistics on members' service utilization.
term_privacy_section_1_item_4_title: 4. Identity Verification and Real-Name Confirmation upon Service Use and Inquiries
term_privacy_section_1_item_4_desc: Securing communication channels for additional inquiries and follow-up investigations related to product inquiries.
term_privacy_section_2_title: Processing and Retention Period of Personal Information
term_privacy_section_2_item_1: 1. DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. processes and retains personal information within the personal information retention and use period required by statutes or the personal information retention and use period consented to by the data subject upon collection.
term_privacy_section_2_item_2_title: 2. The specific processing and retention periods for each category of personal information are as follows:
term_privacy_section_2_item_2_desc: Records on collection/processing and use of credit information: 3 years
term_privacy_section_2_item_2_desc_2: Records on consumer complaints or dispute resolution: 5 years from the date of dispute resolution completion.
term_privacy_section_3_desc: DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. uses the user's personal information only within the scope notified in the 'Purposes of Processing Personal Information' and does not use it beyond that scope or provide it to third parties without the prior consent of the user, except as permitted under general legal principles.
term_privacy_section_4_title: Rights and Obligations of Data Subjects and Legal Representatives and Methods of Exercise
term_privacy_section_4_item_1: 1. Data subjects may exercise their rights to access, correct, delete, or suspend the processing of their personal information against DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. at any time.
term_privacy_section_4_item_2: 2. The exercise of rights pursuant to Paragraph 1 may be made in writing, via electronic mail, or facsimile (FAX) in accordance with Article 41, Paragraph 1 of the Enforcement Decree of the Personal Information Protection Act, and DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. will take action without delay.
term_privacy_section_4_item_3: 3. The exercise of rights pursuant to Paragraph 1 may be done through a legal representative of the data subject or an agent who has been delegated authority. In this case, a power of attorney in accordance with Form No. 11 of the 'Notice on Methods of Processing Personal Information (No. 2020-7)' must be submitted.
term_privacy_section_4_item_4: 4. Requests for access to and suspension of processing of personal information may be restricted under Article 35, Paragraph 4 and Article 37, Paragraph 2 of the Personal Information Protection Act.
term_privacy_section_4_item_5: 5. DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. verifies whether the person making the request for access, correction, deletion, or suspension of processing is the data subject themselves or a legitimate representative.
term_privacy_section_5_desc:
DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. collects the minimum personal information required for seamless customer consultation and product provision:
 Email, phone number, name, company name, job title, department, inquiry details, service utilization logs, access logs, cookies, and access IP information.
term_privacy_section_6_item_1: 1. DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. destroys personal information without delay when it becomes unnecessary, such as upon expiration of the retention period or achievement of the processing purpose.
term_privacy_section_6_item_2: 2. If personal information must be continuously preserved under other statutes despite the expiration of the retention period consented to by the data subject or the achievement of the processing purpose, the personal information is transferred to a separate database (DB) or stored in a different location.
term_privacy_section_6_item_3_title: 3. The procedures and methods for destroying personal information are as follows:
term_privacy_section_6_item_3_desc: Destruction Procedure: DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. selects the personal information for which the reason for destruction has occurred and destroys it with the approval of the company's Privacy Officer. | Destruction Method: Personal information recorded and stored in electronic file format is destroyed so that the records cannot be reproduced, and personal information recorded and stored in paper documents is shredded or incinerated.
term_privacy_section_7_title: Measures to Secure the Safety of Personal Information
term_privacy_section_7_desc: DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. takes the following measures to ensure the safety of personal information:
term_privacy_section_7_item_1_desc: To ensure safety related to the handling of personal information, regular (once a quarter) self-audits are conducted.
term_privacy_section_7_item_2_title: 2. Minimization and Training of Staff Handling Personal Information
term_privacy_section_7_item_2_desc: We designate specific employees who handle personal information and limit access to designated staff only to minimize and manage personal information hazards.
term_privacy_section_7_item_3_title: 3. Establishment and Implementation of Internal Management Plans
term_privacy_section_7_item_3_desc: An internal management plan has been established and implemented for the secure processing of personal information.
term_privacy_section_7_item_4_desc: The DEEP.FINE Website installs security programs and performs periodic updates and inspections to prevent personal information leakage or corruption caused by hacking or computer viruses. Systems are installed in areas where access from the outside is controlled, monitoring and blocking both technically and physically.
term_privacy_section_7_item_5_desc: The user's personal information and passwords are encrypted, stored, and managed so that only the user knows them. For critical data, separate security features such as file/transmission data encryption or file locking functions are used.
term_privacy_section_7_item_6_title: 6. Retention of Access Logs and Prevention of Forgery/Alteration
term_privacy_section_7_item_6_desc: Records of access to the personal information processing system are maintained and managed for at least 1 year. However, if personal information of more than 50,000 data subjects is added, or unique identification information or sensitive data is processed, records are stored and managed for more than 2 years. Security features are deployed to prevent access records from being forged, altered, stolen, or lost.
term_privacy_section_7_item_7_desc: Necessary measures are taken to control access to personal information by granting, changing, and revoking access rights to the database system processing personal information, and unauthorized access from the outside is controlled using an intrusion prevention system.
term_privacy_section_8_title: Matters Concerning Installation, Operation, and Rejection of Automatic Personal Information Collection Devices
term_privacy_section_8_item_1: 1. The company uses 'cookies' that store and retrieve user information from time to time to ensure stable website operations.
term_privacy_section_8_item_2_title: 2. Cookies are small amounts of information sent by the server (HTTP) used to run the website to the user's computer browser and may be stored on the hard disk of the user's PC computer.
term_privacy_section_8_item_2_desc: Purpose of Cookie Use: Cookies are used to grasp visitation and utilization formats for each service and website visited by the user to ensure stable website operation. | Installation, Operation, and Rejection of Cookies: You can refuse cookie storage through the option settings in Tools > Internet Options > Privacy menu at the top of your web browser. Even if users refuse to store cookies, there are no difficulties or disadvantages in using the website.
term_privacy_section_9_desc: DEEP.FINE Co., Ltd. takes overall responsibility for matters related to personal information processing and designates a Privacy Officer as follows to handle complaints and remedy damages of data subjects regarding personal information processing.
term_privacy_section_9_officer_note: If you need to report or consult on other privacy infringements, please contact the following agencies:
term_privacy_agency_1: 1. Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee: (Without Area Code) 1833-6972
term_privacy_agency_2: 2. Personal Information Infringement Report Center: (Without Area Code) 118
term_privacy_agency_3: 3. Cybercrime Investigation Division, Supreme Prosecutors' Office: (Without Area Code) 1301
term_privacy_agency_4: 4. Cyber Log-in, National Police Agency: (Without Area Code) 182
term_privacy_section_10_desc: This Privacy Policy is effective as of February 25, 2022.
